t: From now and forever, may integrity be found among you.
All my words of truth shall come upon you.
The blessing of the world shall rest upon you.
And it will be established for all generations forever.
You shall no longer fear nor tremble, but rise to instruct judgment over.
Show the obligations of all the guilty of the world, both in fire and in the depths, and in all spaces, for the pure generations to come.
All the sons of wickedness shall perish.
And now, Amram my son, I charge you.
[...] and to his sons, I charge.
[...] gave to Levi my father, and Levi my father gave to me.
All the writings of the testimony that you should be cautious therein.
In them you shall have great merit, and their ordinances shall be with you.
